svg.title: PRISM framework pipeline: offline paradigm distillation phase and online inference phase connected by the paradigm library
svg.desc: Two-phase architecture diagram. Left: offline phase with five steps from puzzle generator to Z3 verifier. Center: paradigm library database. Right: online phase with seven steps from new puzzle input to solution output, including repair memory and strategy switcher.
svg.text: UNSAT attribution: new assertion vs. legacy error
